note: GitHub Discussions are not accessible via the available MCP tools (list_issues / search_issues do not cover Discussions). The gh CLI is also unavailable in this environment. This file reflects what can be inferred from issue labels tagged 'discussion'.

discussion_label_proxy.note: Issues labeled 'discussion' in the main issues tracker serve as a proxy metric.

action_needed: To enable full discussion analytics, configure gh CLI access or add a Discussions-capable GraphQL MCP endpoint. The GraphQL query used in the task spec requires: repository.discussions(first:100, orderBy:{field:UPDATED_AT, direction:DESC})
workaround_query: gh api graphql -f query='{ repository(owner: "CherryHQ", name: "cherry-studio") { discussions(first: 100, orderBy: {field: UPDATED_AT, direction: DESC}) { nodes { number title category { name } author { login } createdAt updatedAt upvoteCount comments { totalCount } answer { author { login } createdAt } } } } }'
